rows.label: qev026001_MSG0001
rows.name:
Welcome!
Welcome to the universally renowned fine establishment,
the Candid & Credible House of Fine Wares! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026001_MSG0002
rows.name:
Say, I was thinking about how we could
be of use to you Earthlings, ne. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026001_MSG0003
rows.name:
Director General Maurice gave us some advice, ne.
He said the best way to achieve a friendly and rapid social integration
was to start a mutually beneficial business. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026001_MSG0004
rows.name:
So I've decided to supply the technological prowess
we Ma-non pride ourselves on to you at sincere prices, yo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026001_MSG0005
rows.name:
From paper napkins to interstellar spaceships!
For all your item needs, feel free to rely on the
trusted and proven Candid & Credible House of Fine Wares! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026001_MSG0006
rows.name:
...Well, that was the idea, and the shop was
supposed to be hugely prosperous, yo ne. Really... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026001_MSG0007
rows.name: But business is hard, yo. We're already having a ton of problems, yo... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026001_MSG0008
rows.name:
Meeting you at this timing must be fate, yo.
I want you to hear me out for a bit, yo ne. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026001_MSG0009
rows.name:
First, there's something I want you to see,
so come to our ship, yo!
I won't take up much of your time, and I won't make you regret it, yo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026001_JNK0010
rows.name: Agree[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026001_SEL0011
rows.name: Nod and accept Tutura's request.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026001_JNK0020
rows.name: Refuse[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026001_SEL0021
rows.name: Decline, saying you don't have the time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026001_MSG0010
rows.name:
Deal! I'm so happy, yo ne!
You look like you'll be a good customer, yo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026001_MSG0011
rows.name:
Ne? We'll serve you with utmost sincerity,
so I look forward to a long and fruitful relationship, ne! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026001_MSG0012
rows.name: Don't be so cold, yo-! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026001_MSG0013
rows.name:
I know you're busy, but
this is a perfectly fine chance to make a profit, yo!
It's a business talk, yo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026001_MSG0014
rows.name:
Ne? If things go well, an exclusive contract is possible, yo!
The Candid & Credible House of Fine Wares will definitely become a major corporation,
so there's no sweeter deal than this, yo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026001_MSG0015
rows.name:
Well, now that we have an agreement,
I'll give you the detailed explanation later, yo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026001_MSG0016
rows.name:
Over there, there's a super amazing transport device
set up by us at the Candid & Credible House of Fine Wares, ne. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026001_MSG0017
rows.name:
Use that to zip on over to the Ma-non ship, yo!
I'll be waiting, so come quickly, ne! [ST:wait ]
